one_time_description: Income from long-term investments (TNDLP modified equity method income of $2,949,758) and prior year losses on THT and TLC investments of $12.9M
economic_notes: Band operates tourism, post office, equipment operations, community economic development. TNDLP has joint venture agreements in support and construction services. Wildfire recovery from 2018 Alkali Lake wildfire ongoing.
notes: Audit is qualified on multiple bases: (1) Stikine River Song Cafe and Tahltan Centre Ltd. should be consolidated but are recorded using modified equity method; (2) 33.3% interest in Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership - no financial info received for 2021; (3) Tahltan Heritage Trust accounting change from modified equity to cost method with prospective application unsubstantiated; (4) Volcano Creek Limited Partnership transfer issues; (5) Tahltan Nation Community Development Corporation dissolved with no records; (6) Tangible capital assets listing is incomplete and may include assets no longer in use. Nation is located in BC (Telegraph Creek area) but auditor address is Edmonton AB - province set to BC based on operations. Long-term debt includes $941,233 revolving/loans payable plus $80,709 capital lease obligations. Annual debt service estimated from repayment of revolving facility and loans payable ($490,792) plus capital lease repayment ($19,905). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + DFO + CMHC + Ottawa Trust + Ministry of Forests + Ministry of Children + Ministry of Justice + Northern Health + BCFN Gaming + AHMA + FNESC.
